arts.sum: Newcastle United are busy preparing to face Brighton in the fifth round of the FA Cup this weekend. Here, Chronicle Live takes a look at the details for the FA Cup quarter-final draw.

arts.sum: Newcastle are bidding to make the quarter-finals for a second year running, while Brighton exited the competition at this point last season

arts.ttl: 'Arrogant bunch', 'won f*** all' - What Keane & Wright really think of Newcastle
arts.sum: Speaking to Premier League Productions earlier this year, Ian Wright, in part, said: "I think the biggest problem now is clubs coming in and trying to poach players. The first will see presenter Mark Pougatch joined by pundits Roy Keane and Ian Wright on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Brighton XI vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Brighton head to Newcastle in the FA Cup’s fifth round this afternoon. The Seagulls are seeking a fifth straight win in all competitions having found form under Fabian Hurzeler. Brighton beat Bournemouth in the Premier League in midweek to strengthen their challenge for European football. That result followed a 4-0 thrashing of Southampton and back-to-back […] The post Brighton XI vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Brighton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion make the long trip north to face Newcastle United in the FA Cup fifth round on Sunday afternoon. The trip to St James' Park will prove a mighty challenge, but the south coast side have tasted victory at the venue in the Premier League this term already.

arts.ttl: Transfer gossip: Brighton face summer battle to keep talent as Liverpool and Chelsea weigh up move
arts.sum: Liverpool and Chelsea are both eyeing a potential summer move for Brighton talent Carlos Beleba.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make the most of sacked Man United scouting guru after Dutchman jets in
arts.sum: The Dutchman, who headed Manchester United's scouting system for six years, came on board at Newcastle in late 2023 following his role at Old Trafford, where he worked alongside Louis van Gaal but stayed on after the ex-Barcelona manager's departure. Newcastle United's European scouting supremo Marcel Bout has been on Tyneside to discuss the summer's recruitment plans.
